stimulus: In 1720, the price of shares in the South Sea Company collapsed in London, wiping out fortunes of thousands of investors who had purchased the stock at its peak. Some economists ______blank that this “South Sea Bubble” was one of the earliest documented examples of a speculative bubble, in which investor enthusiasm drives prices far above what underlying value can justify.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. A main clause requires a finite verb. The finite present tense verb “argue” correctly performs the action of the plural subject “some economists.”

Choices A, B, and D are all nonfinite forms that cannot serve as the main verb of a clause.
